title: Caramelized Peaches Slices Brazilian
description: A floral and juicy dessert dish featuring caramel sauce, perfectly suited for a lazy Sunday indulgence in the Brazilian cuisine tradition, this recipe is diabetic-friendly and air-fried for an easy preparation.

ingredients.name: Granulated Sugar
ingredients.notes: Use a low-glycemic sweetener like coconut sugar if needed.

instructions: Preheat your air fryer to 350°F (175°C). Wash and peel the peaches, then slice them into thin rounds.
In a small saucepan over medium heat, mix granulated sugar with half of the water until dissolved. Bring mixture to a boil, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat to low and slowly add remaining water while continuously stirring to prevent burning. Cook for about 2-3 minutes or until the caramel reaches desired consistency (soft crack stage).
Carefully place peach slices into the air fryer basket in one layer without overcrowding. Drizzle half of the warm caramel sauce evenly over the peaches and toss gently to coat.
Cook for 8-10 minutes, shaking pan halfway through cooking time. Remove from heat and serve warm with additional caramel if desired.
For optimal freshness, consume within a day.
